# XP.css (retro-xp-css)

**Upstream:** https://github.com/botoxparty/XP.css
**Demo:** https://botoxparty.github.io/XP.css/ (also ./demo.html)
**License:** MIT (c) 2020 Adam Hammad, Jordan Scales — see LICENSE

## What it looks like
Windows XP Luna aesthetic. Blue gradient title-bars, rounded corners, green Start button,
glossy 3D chrome, Tahoma typography. Built on top of 98.css as an XP theme extension.

## What it offers
- All 98.css components work natively
- Theme variants in ./themes: Luna (default blue), Olive Green, Silver, Royale, Zune
- XP-specific: taskbar, start menu, Fisher-Price glossy controls
- Shipped as theme-layered CSS atop 98.css — you can mix both

## Clawmachine fit
Color temperature is wrong for operator's palette (Luna blue is corporate),
but the Royale/Zune themes are darker and could work as a "second-era PC" layer.
Theming system (swap theme by body class) is reusable pattern for Clawmachine's multi-mode palette.
